title: Kuttipayale Lyrics Inga Enna Solludhu Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Kuttipayale
Singer(s): STR
Lyricist: STR
Movie: Inga Enna Solludhu
Music: Dharan Kumar

Kuttipayale Kuttipayale
edha thaedi ne odura
chutti payale chutti payale
edhukkaaga ne alayira.

Arivodathaan porakkura
aana valarndhu muttaal aagura.
Kadavula kelvi ketkura,
naan unna unna ketkuren.

Arivillaya arivillaya
konjam kooda arivillaya.
puriyalaya puriyalaya
inga enna solludhunu puriyalaya.

Un kannuku munnadi irukudhu
kannaadi purinjaakkaa neeyumthaan killaadi.
Urundaalum porandaalum, sirichaalum
azhuthaalum adhuthaan un munnadi nadakumada.

Indha vithaya konjam ne kathuko.
purinjikittu unmaya othuko.
Vadivela polathaan kannai munnadi
korangu bomba vela ketkurada..

Uzhagamey maayainu arivendra kanaala
kannaadiya odachaakaa theriyumada.

Arivillaya arivillaya,
konjam kooda arivillaya.
puriyalaya puriyalaya,
inga enna solludhunu puriyalaya.

Adhu ponnaaga irundhaalum pennaaga irundhaalum
thaedi ne ponaakaa kidaikaadhada.
Thaedaama odaama alayaama irundhaakkaa
uzhagamey unakumthaan adimayada.

Nallavanradhu nallavan illada.
kettavan ellaam kettu ponadhillada
nallavanaa irundhaalum
kettavana irundhaalum
kandippaa motcham thaan kidaikaadhada.

Nallavana illaama kettavanaa illaama
naduvula ninnaakkaa kadavulada..

Thiruttu payale thiruttupayale
edha thiruda ne thudikkura.
Kallapayale kallapaye edha nenachi ne
kalangura.

Arivodathaan porakkura
aana valarndhu muttaal aagura.
Kadavula kelvi ketkura,
naan unna unna ketkuren.

Arivillaya arivillaya
konjam kooda arivillaya.
puriyalaya puriyalaya
inga enna solludhunu puriyalaya.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Kuttipayale?

The song Kuttipayale is about youthful energy and the carefree spirit of chasing dreams.

Who is the singer of Kuttipayale?

Simbu is the singer of the song Kuttipayale.

Who composed the music for Inga Enna Solludhu?

The music for Inga Enna Solludhu was composed by Dharan Kumar.

What is the release year of the movie Inga Enna Solludhu?

The movie Inga Enna Solludhu was released in the year 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kuttipayale from the movie Inga Enna Solludhu captures the essence of youthful exuberance and the carefree spirit of chasing dreams. Sung by Simbu, the track is energetic and peppy, making it a perfect fit for parties and celebrations. The lyrics, penned by Simbu himself, reflect a playful yet introspective take on life. Dharan Kumar's music adds a pulsating rhythm that complements the vibrant theme of the song.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Feel the vibrant energy of Kuttipayale from the movie Inga Enna Solludhu, where Simbu's dynamic vocals meet Dharan Kumar's electrifying beats. This song is a perfect blend of catchy lyrics and a pulsating rhythm that will get you moving. Dive into this energetic track that captures the essence of youthful exuberance.
stanzaMeanings: Little rascal, little rascal, what are you running after? Naughty kid, naughty kid, why are you wandering?
Born with intelligence, but growing up to be a fool. You question God, I question you.
No sense, no sense, not even a little sense. Don't you understand, don't you understand what's being said here?
There's a mirror in front of your eyes, if you understand, you'll be clever. Whether you roll, are born, laugh, or cry, that's what will happen in front of you.
Learn this lesson a bit. Understand it and accept the truth. Like a spear in front of your eyes, the monkey doll is asking for work.
When you break the mirror of the illusion that the world is magic, you'll see the truth.
No sense, no sense, not even a little sense. Don't you understand, don't you understand what's being said here?
Whether it's a girl or a woman, if you go searching, you won't find it. If you stay without searching or running, the world will be your servant.
There's no good person or bad person. Not everyone who is bad has gone bad. Whether you're good or bad, you definitely won't find salvation.
Without being good or bad, if you stand in the middle, that's God.
Thief, thief, what are you trying to steal? Liar, liar, what are you worried about?
Born with intelligence, but growing up to be a fool. You question God, I question you.
No sense, no sense, not even a little sense. Don't you understand, don't you understand what's being said here?
